titleStmt.title: SII 29.50: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 50. (A.R. No. B. 189 of 1962-63.) MADDŪRU, ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the ruined Fort.
The top portion of the slab is broken and lost. Writing on the right side of the slab is also badly damaged. The record belongs to the reign period of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalladēva.

It registers a gift of income from taxes for maintaining a perpetual lamp in the temple of Chintaka Rēchēśvara of Maddūru by Viṭṭapayya-Billamayya, the kēṇiverggaḍe of vaḍḍarāvuḷa and biḷkoḍe (taxes), Rakkasayya Māchirāja, the perggaḍe of perjjuṁka, Chaṭṭimayya and others at the instance of the vaḍḍarāvuḷa daṇḍanāyaka Mahēśvarayya when daṇḍanāyaka Rudra-bhaṭṭōpādhyāya was governing over Ayje-300 division.
The record is dated in the Chālukya Vikrama year 12, Prabhava, uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1087 A.D., December 25 [Saturday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya
mahārājādhirāja paramē
satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
śrīmattribhuvanamalladē
levīḍinalsukha saṁkhathā
geyyuttamire śrīmattri
dhyarappa śrīmadayyaṁga
daṇḍanāyakaṁ śrī rudrabhaṭṭa
ru Ayje 300 maṁ sukhasaṁkathā
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttumire cāḷakya
ma varṣada 12 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada yutta
rāyaṇa saṁkrānti nimittadiṁ maddūra cintaka
recēśvara dēvargge naṁdādīvigegeṁdu naḍuva
ṇa bhaṭṭiya vaḍḍarāvuḷa daṁḍanāyakaṁ ma
hēśvarayyana besadiṁ Ayje 300 vaḍḍarā
vuḷada bilkoḍeya kēṇiverggeḍe viṭṭapa
yya billamayyanuṁ rakkasayyanuṁ pe
rjjuṁkada perggaḍe mācirājanuṁ caṭṭimayyanuṁ

prayāge
mallikhārjjuna do
ḷ kavilaigaḷa brā
hmaṇaranaḷida pā
taka . svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vayō ha
rēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣa
ṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ .
māmā
ṟiṁge Ele
Digital edition of SII 29.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
